title: Fix OPFSBackend consistency: stat() directory support, delete() error handling, empty-path validation
description: Three OPFS-specific architecture gaps: (1) OPFSBackend.stat() always returns isDirectory:false — implement directory detection using FileSystemDirectoryHandle iteration. (2) OPFSBackend.delete() throws if path not found — wrap in try/catch and silently no-op like other backends. (3) OPFSBackend missing empty-path validation that AgenticStoreBackend and NodeFsBackend have. Add tests for all three. Target: architecture gaps 'OPFSBackend.stat() isDirectory:false', 'OPFSBackend.delete() no error handling', 'OPFSBackend missing empty-path validation'
